title: bashal #1310
definition:
1) to boil, cook, bake, roast, ripen, grow ripe
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to boil, cook
        1a2) to grow ripe, ripen
    1b) (Piel)
        1b1) to boil
        1b2) to cook
    1c) (Pual)
        1c1) to be boiled
        1c2) to be sodden
    1d) (Hiphil)
        1d1) to ripen
        1d2) ripen, brought to ripeness
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to boil, cook, bake, roast, ripen, grow ripe
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to boil, cook
        1a2) to grow ripe, ripen
    1b) (Piel)
        1b1) to boil
        1b2) to cook
    1c) (Pual)

        1c2) to be sodden
    1d) (Hiphil)

        1d2) ripen, brought to ripeness

    NASB:  to boil, seethe, grow ripe
